message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram
    participant User/Admin as User
    participant UI/CLI as UI_CLI
    participant AF_Microservice as AF_Microservice
    participant NEF as NEF
    participant NGC_CP_Functions as NGC_CP_Functions

    Note over UI_CLI, AF_Microservice, NEF, NGC_CP_Functions: OpenNESS Controller components
    Note over NEF: OpenNESS provided Core component with limited functionality

    Note over UI_CLI, AF_Microservice, NEF, NGC_CP_Functions: 5G Core components

    Note over UI_CLI, AF_Microservice, NEF, NGC_CP_Functions: Get all subscribed traffic influence info

    User->>UI_CLI: Request all traffic influence subscribed
    UI_CLI->>AF_Microservice: /af/v1/subscriptions : GET
    AF_Microservice->>NEF: /3gpp-traffic-Influence/v1/{afld}/subscriptions : GET
    NEF->>NGC_CP_Functions: NGC_STUB(PCF,UDR,BSF)
    NGC_CP_Functions->>NEF: {Open: 3rd party NGC integration with OpenNESS(NEF)}
    NEF-->>AF_Microservice: OK: traffic influence info ERROR: {400/500}
    AF_Microservice-->>UI_CLI: OK: traffic influence info ERROR: {400/500}
    UI_CLI-->>User: Traffic influence details

    Note over UI_CLI, AF_Microservice, NEF, NGC_CP_Functions: Get subscribed traffic influence info by subscriptionId

    User->>UI_CLI: Request traffic influence using subscriptionId
    UI_CLI->>AF_Microservice: /af/v1/subscriptions/{subscriptionId} : GET
    AF_Microservice->>NEF: /3gpp-traffic-Influence/v1/{afld}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId} : GET
    NEF->>NGC_CP_Functions: NGC_STUB(PCF,UDR,BSF)
    NGC_CP_Functions->>NEF: {Open: 3rd party NGC integration with OpenNESS(NEF)}
    NEF-->>AF_Microservice: OK: traffic influence info ERROR: {400/500}
    AF_Microservice-->>UI_CLI: OK: traffic influence info ERROR: {400/500}
    UI_CLI-->>User: Traffic influence details

@enduml
